title: Thai-Style Roasted Chickpea Bites
description: Crispy roasted chickpea bites seasoned with Thai spices. A delicious and easy snack to make.
instructions: Rinse the chickpeas and pat them dry with paper towels.
In a bowl, mix together the olive oil, Thai red chili flakes, cumin, salt, black pepper, and garlic powder.
Add the chickpeas to the bowl and toss them to coat them evenly with the spice mixture.
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and spread the chickpeas out in a single layer.
Roast the chickpeas in the preheated oven for 30-40 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
Remove the chickpeas from the oven and let them cool completely on the baking sheet.
Once the chickpeas have cooled, transfer them to an airtight container and store them in the fridge for up to 5 days.
